name: andisor-inventory-platform
description: Full-stack product inventory platform — Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL API with BullMQ async imports, and a Vite + React inventory UI.

scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace backend run lint && npm --workspace frontend run lint
scripts.format: npm --workspace backend run format && npm --workspace frontend run format
scripts.format:check: npm --workspace backend run format:check && npm --workspace frontend run format:check
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace backend run test && npm --workspace frontend run test
